description: Self-IP Agency cron configuration template. Fill WORKSPACE_PATH after install. Uses OpenClaw CLI named-flag syntax (--name, --cron, --message).

jobs.name: main-heartbeat
jobs.description: Main orchestrator heartbeat — checks TAS, dispatches sub-agents. Entrypoint: scripts/main-heartbeat.sh
jobs.message_template: Run the main heartbeat cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/main-heartbeat.sh

jobs.name: bookmarker-cycle
jobs.description: Bookmarker social curation cycle. Entrypoint: scripts/bookmarker-cycle.sh
jobs.message_template: Run the bookmarker curation cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/bookmarker-cycle.sh

jobs.name: trader-cycle
jobs.description: Trader on-chain operations cycle (runs hourly). Entrypoint: scripts/trader-cycle.sh
jobs.message_template: Run the trader operations cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/trader-cycle.sh

jobs.name: x-sync-cycle
jobs.description: Owner X raw sync cycle. First run backfills the last 3 days, later runs sync incrementally and compile wiki artifacts when new items arrive. Entrypoint: scripts/x-sync-cycle.sh
jobs.message_template: Run the owner X sync cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/x-sync-cycle.sh

openclaw_cron_commands: openclaw cron add --name "main-heartbeat" --cron "*/10 * * * *" --session isolated --message "Run the main heartbeat cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/main-heartbeat.sh"
openclaw cron add --name "bookmarker-cycle" --cron "*/30 * * * *" --session isolated --message "Run the bookmarker curation cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/bookmarker-cycle.sh"
openclaw cron add --name "trader-cycle" --cron "0 * * * *" --session isolated --message "Run the trader operations cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/trader-cycle.sh"
openclaw cron add --name "x-sync-cycle" --cron "*/30 * * * *" --session isolated --message "Run the owner X sync cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/x-sync-cycle.sh"

_notes.channel_config: No announce channel is required for local/distributable deployments. All cycle scripts run locally and write results to runtime/*/. To enable optional announcements, configure announce_channel in config/agency.config.yaml.
_notes.entrypoint_model: All cron jobs use dedicated shell entrypoints (scripts/*-heartbeat.sh, scripts/*-cycle.sh). The legacy pattern of 'Read runtime/*/task.json' is NOT used — task.json files in runtime-template are compatibility placeholders only.
_notes.cron_syntax_migration: Migrated from legacy positional-arg format (openclaw cron add NAME SCHEDULE COMMAND) to new named-flag format (--name, --cron, --session, --message) as required by current OpenClaw CLI.
